creator: stefan.wendler@tngtech.com
text: Are there any news here? I am having this problem as well. I have read somewhere that adding a 'sleep 1' in '/usr/local/libexec/gnome-setting-daemon-localeexec' before the actual execution of gnome would fix the problem since it is supposed to be a deadlock of some sort. But that only fixes it for me sometimes. (https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/oh-no-something-has-gone-wrong-gnome3.60383/)
